message:
feat(tui,server): deferred background worker startup and ambient renderer cached-composite optimization

TUI deferred background workers (lib.rs, integrity_guard.rs, tui_bridge.rs):
- Move all heavyweight background workers (cleanup, ack_ttl, tool_metrics,
  retention, integrity_guard, disk_monitor, search bridge, consistency
  probe) behind two startup latches: first-paint and DB-ready
- This eliminates the visible stutter that occurred when 8+ background
  workers competed with the TUI's initial frame render for CPU time
- Add Condvar-based wait_for_first_paint() and wait_for_db_ready() to
  TuiSharedState so the deferred-worker thread blocks without spinning
- The integrity guard's first proactive backup is deferred via a one-shot
  flag (defer_next_proactive_backup) so the quick health check still runs
  immediately but the expensive WAL checkpoint is delayed until after
  first paint
- mark_db_ready() is called from the readiness warmup success path so
  the deferred workers start as soon as migrations complete

Ambient renderer cached-composite (tui_widgets.rs, tui_app.rs):
- Replace the previous render_cached() approach (re-compositing from the
  effect buffer) with a direct bg-cell cache that stores the final
  composited PackedRgba values from the last full render
- Add can_replay_cached() that checks area dimensions against the cached
  buffer size, enabling automatic cache invalidation on terminal resize
- The composite_halfblock() method now writes each final bg color into
  the cache as it computes it, so render_cached() becomes a simple
  memcpy-style loop with zero floating-point math
- On frames where the ambient simulation is throttled (every other frame),
  the cached replay overwrites the frame buffer directly from the cache
  instead of re-running the plasma/metaball/doom-fire simulation
- Add clear_cached_composite() called from all early-exit paths (empty
  area, disabled effects, degraded rendering) to prevent stale cache
  replays after a mode change
- Compute chrome layout before ambient rendering so the ambient effect
  fills only the content area, not the full terminal
- Pass base_bg through to composite_halfblock so the over() blend uses
  the correct background color instead of whatever was in the frame buffer
- Add 4 new tests: cached replay matches rendered output, cached replay
  overwrites different frame backgrounds, resize forces rerender between
  throttle buckets, degraded-render clears cache

Cleanup and lint fixes:
- Use let-chains (if !empty && let Err(err) = ...) in cleanup.rs to
  reduce nesting
- Add clippy::too_many_lines allows on long query/test functions
- Replace resume_unwind with panic_any (correct API for Box<dyn Any>)
- Use method reference char::is_ascii_digit in ss PID parser
- Update MCP config files (codex, cursor, gemini) to port 8877

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
